mapper.insert: insert into member (member_id, email, password, name, nickname, profile_image , social_type, role, access_token, refresh_token, create_date , latest_date, status) values (#{member_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{profile_image,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{social_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{role,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{access_token,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refresh_token,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_char(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') , #{latest_date,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete: delete from member where member_id = #{member_id} and password = #{password}
mapper.select: select member_id as "member_id", email as "email", password as "password", name as "name", nickname as "nickname" , profile_image as "profile_image" , social_type as "social_type", role as "role", access_token as "access_token" , refresh_token as "refresh_token", create_date as "create_date" , latest_date as "latest_date", status as "status" from member where member_id = #{member_id}
select member_id from member where lower(trim(nickname)) = lower(trim(#{nickname}))

select member_id as "member_id", email as "email", password as "password", name as "name", nickname as "nickname" , profile_image as "profile_image" , social_type as "social_type", role as "role", access_token as "access_token" , refresh_token as "refresh_token", create_date as "create_date" , latest_date as "latest_date", status as "status" from member where email = #{email}

select member_id as "member_id", email as "email", password as "password", name as "name", nickname as "nickname" , profile_image as "profile_image" , social_type as "social_type", role as "role", access_token as "access_token" , refresh_token as "refresh_token", create_date as "create_date" , latest_date as "latest_date", status as "status" from member where member_id = #{member_id}
select member_id as "member_id", email as "email", name as "name", role as "role" from member order by create_date desc

SELECT member_id as "member_id", name as "name", password as "password", email as "email", role as "role" , social_type as "social_type", profile_image as "profile_image" FROM member WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT member_id as "member_id", name as "name", password as "password", email as "email" , role as "role", social_type as "social_type", profile_image as "profile_image" FROM member WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
